audit_items.proof_trace: The only allocation in ae_select.c is zmalloc(sizeof(aeApiState)) in aeApiCreate (L43), stored as eventLoop->apidata, and it is freed exactly once in aeApiFree (L59). aeApiFree is called solely from aeDeleteEventLoop (ae.c:126); the code that follows in aeDeleteEventLoop frees eventLoop->events, eventLoop->fired, and eventLoop itself — none access eventLoop->apidata again. No ae_select.c function (aeApiAddEvent, aeApiDelEvent, aeApiPoll) is reachable after aeApiFree returns, as aeDeleteEventLoop is a terminal cleanup routine after which the eventLoop object is fully destroyed.
